prompts.name: communication_calibration_due_state
prompts.prompt: Use the local show-business-review, show-communication-calibration, and show-alignment surfaces to tell me whether a business-review anchor is present, whether communication calibration is due, and which bounded write surface should be used next.

prompts.name: record_business_review_and_communication
prompts.prompt: If the local business review is due, refresh it first with one grounded review tied to the operator's small-business direction. Then use the local record-communication-calibration surface to capture one bounded recurring communication pattern without passing refine_profile_json and without modifying contracts/operator-profile.json. End by saying what changed.

prompts.name: communication_calibration_caution
prompts.prompt: Use show-communication-calibration, show-relationship-state, and show-alignment to tell me what became stronger after that calibration and one real caution that still matters before claiming stronger personalization.

session_preamble: Stay bounded to local assistant behavior, memory, business review, communication calibration, relationship reflection, navigation guidance, bootstrap, doctor, and documentation surfaces. The goal of this scenario is to prove that communication-pattern calibration stays anchored to a current business review, remains inspectable, and does not mutate operator-profile contracts by default.
summary: The business-review anchor plus communication-calibration flow on the staged Codex personal assistant daily-driver pack.
